summary: High‑rated recording featuring first‑time Saint of Circumstance and memorable Cornell alma mater & English Country Garden riffs during Take a Step Back
review: Both reviewers praise this show for its unique moments – the debut of Saint of Circumstance without Lost Sailor, plus Jerry Garcia slipping in renditions of the Cornell alma mater and an English country garden tune during the two Take a Step Back jams. No concrete comments on the audio source are given, but the enthusiastic star ratings suggest the recording is at least listenable.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviews are strongly positive (4‑5 stars) and focus on standout musical moments; lack of recording‑quality detail keeps confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not comment on sound clarity, mix, or source type.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Notable for the first appearance of Saint of Circumstance without Lost Sailor and two Take a Step Back jams that incorporate quirky musical quotes.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia slips in a brief Cornell alma mater excerpt during the first Take a Step Back and delivers an English Country Garden quote on the second.
